questions: Bangladesh e theater er obostha kemon
answers: Theater is a live performing art where actors perform stories on stage before an audience. It includes drama, musical theater, comedy, tragedy, and experimental performances.
Theater holo live performance — stage e actor ra story perform kore audience er shamne. Cinema er theke alag karon ekhane real-time e shob hocche, kono retake nei.

Famous plays include Hamlet and Romeo & Juliet (Shakespeare), A Streetcar Named Desire (Tennessee Williams), Waiting for Godot (Beckett), and The Phantom of the Opera (musical). Bangladesh has a rich theater tradition with groups like Dhaka Theatre.

Theater types include proscenium (traditional stage), thrust (audience on 3 sides), theater-in-the-round (audience surrounds stage), and black box (flexible space). To get into theater, join local groups and attend workshops.
